situation: audit-2026-07-08-045 finding PA-B2-L-003: _parse_hm regex partially parses compound time expressions like '三点半十分' → matches '三点半' (3:30) and silently drops '十分'. User gets wrong time with no indication of data loss.
action: Added logging import + module logger. After successful regex match in _parse_hm, inspect tail of input string past match span. If tail contains time-related tokens (NUM+分/秒 or 半+NUM), emit logger.warning with matched text, full input, and dropped tail. Non-breaking: still returns parsed result, just warns.
outcome_evidence: Commit da722fe on auto/opt-temporal-1783392187 pushed to origin. Adds 7 lines (import logging, logger init, 4-line tail check with warning). cp-guard triggered due to diverged worktree (M-002 fix already present); edited directly in worktree per escape hatch protocol.
next_suggestion: Dispatch remaining pending fix PA-B2-L-002 (reminders.py notify log non-atomic append). After both L-002 and L-003 are merged/rejected, mark audit-cycle-state status=cycle-complete to trigger next full audit.

audit_findings.finding: _parse_hm regex partially parses compound time expressions without warning — trailing time tokens silently dropped
audit_findings.remediation: Added post-match tail inspection + logger.warning for dropped time content
